Lingvanex

Machine translation platform with cloud, on-premise, and mobile deployment options

5/10Overall Rating
7/10Ease of Use
FreeStarting Price
2018Founded
Free Plan Available

About Lingvanex

Lingvanex is a ai translation platform founded in 2018. It positions itself as “Machine translation platform with cloud, on-premise, and mobile deployment options” and is best suited for privacy conscious organizations, on premise needs, mobile apps. Pricing starts at Free, and a free plan is available.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Machine TranslationYes
Translation MemoryNo
GlossaryNo
Api AccessYes
File FormatsYes
Team CollaborationNo
Quality AssuranceNo
Cms IntegrationNo
Real TimeYes
Custom ModelsNo

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • On-premise deployment option
  • Affordable API pricing
  • Good mobile SDK

Cons

  • Translation quality below DeepL/Google
  • Limited TMS features
  • Smaller language coverage
